clusters.title: WeatherNext 2: Our most advanced weather forecasting model
clusters.summary: The new AI model delivers more efficient, more accurate and higher-resolution global weather predictions.

clusters.title: How AI is giving Northern Ireland teachers time back
clusters.summary: A six-month long pilot program with the Northern Ireland Education Authority’s C2k initiative found that integrating Gemini and other generative AI tools saved participating teachers an average of 10 hours per week.

clusters.title: Mapping, modeling, and understanding nature with AI
clusters.summary: AI models can help map species, protect forests and listen to birds around the world

clusters.title: Accelerating discovery with the AI for Math Initiative
clusters.summary: The initiative brings together some of the world's most prestigious research institutions to pioneer the use of AI in mathematical research.

clusters.title: MedGemma: Our most capable open models for health AI development
clusters.summary: We’re announcing new multimodal models in the MedGemma collection, our most capable open models for health AI development.

clusters.title: AlphaEarth Foundations helps map our planet in unprecedented detail
clusters.summary: New AI model integrates petabytes of Earth observation data to generate a unified data representation that revolutionizes global mapping and monitoring

clusters.title: Exploring the context of online images with Backstory
clusters.summary: New experimental AI tool helps people explore the context and origin of images seen online.

clusters.title: Genie 3: A new frontier for world models
clusters.summary: Genie 3 can generate dynamic worlds that you can navigate in real time at 24 frames per second, retaining consistency for a few minutes at a resolution of 720p.

clusters.title: How AI is helping advance the science of bioacoustics to save endangered species
clusters.summary: Our new Perch model helps conservationists analyze audio faster to protect endangered species, from Hawaiian honeycreepers to coral reefs.

clusters.title: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth
clusters.summary: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth

clusters.title: Discovering new solutions to century-old problems in fluid dynamics
clusters.summary: Our new method could help mathematicians leverage AI techniques to tackle long-standing challenges in mathematics, physics and engineering.

clusters.title: Bringing AI to the next generation of fusion energy
clusters.summary: We’re partnering with Commonwealth Fusion Systems (CFS) to bring clean, safe, limitless fusion energy closer to reality.

clusters.title: Try Deep Think in the Gemini app
clusters.summary: We're rolling out Deep Think in the Gemini app for Google AI Ultra subscribers, and we're giving select mathematicians access to the full version of the Gemini 2.5 Deep Think model entered into the IMO competition.

clusters.title: Rethinking how we measure AI intelligence
clusters.summary: Game Arena is a new, open-source platform for rigorous evaluation of AI models. It allows for head-to-head comparison of frontier systems in environments with clear winning conditions.

clusters.title: Introducing Gemma 3 270M: The compact model for hyper-efficient AI
clusters.summary: Today, we're adding a new, highly specialized tool to the Gemma 3 toolkit: Gemma 3 270M, a compact, 270-million parameter model.

clusters.title: VaultGemma: The world's most capable differentially private LLM
clusters.summary: We introduce VaultGemma, the most capable model trained from scratch with differential privacy.
